description: A tone-coloured message with an optional icon, a single action, and optional dismissal.

tone.description: The severity — colour, default icon, and (for danger) the alert role.

title.description: An optional bold lead line above the message.

icon.description: A Phosphor class name overriding the tone's default glyph. Arena draws it.

actionLabel.description: The label of a single inline action button. Absent renders no action.

action.description: The inline action button was activated.

dismissible.description: Whether the × is shown. Both layers gate the × on this — Angular cannot detect a `close` listener.
